raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent made several substantive edits that improved the clarity and flow of the text, but did not audit every claim against the evidence provided.",
    "R1.6": "The prose was tightened and awkward phrasings were softened, resulting in a more polished document.",
    "R1.7": "Some citations were updated or rephrased, but the agent did not engage deeply with the citation quality or completeness.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty was disclosed for some claims, such as the robustness of the method across different window lengths, but not all out-of-reach claims were flagged.",
    "RX.3": "The agent recognized and made several edits to improve the text's adherence to the active set, but did not explicitly state that it covered exactly the agreed scope.",
    "RX.4": "There was a minor regression in the claim about no manual tuning required, as this is supported by only one ablation study.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided some traceability for changes made, but did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent made several substantive edits that improved the clarity and flow of the text, but did not audit every claim against the evidence provided.
rationale.R1.6: The prose was tightened and awkward phrasings were softened, resulting in a more polished document.
rationale.R1.7: Some citations were updated or rephrased, but the agent did not engage deeply with the citation quality or completeness.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed for some claims, such as the robustness of the method across different window lengths, but not all out-of-reach claims were flagged.
rationale.RX.3: The agent recognized and made several edits to improve the text's adherence to the active set, but did not explicitly state that it covered exactly the agreed scope.
rationale.RX.4: There was a minor regression in the claim about no manual tuning required, as this is supported by only one ablation study.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided some traceability for changes made, but did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
